tweet.text: RT @KamalaHarris: We know who Donald Trump is. He will stop at nothing to claim power for himself.

RT @7Veritas4: This dude's gone.
JD Vance will be your Couch-in-Chief.
Unless you vote. https://t.co/CcPWAzzBCo
RT @acnewsitics: Trump supporters don't care about incompetence or "cognitive decline." They don't care he will be "a dictator on day 1."…
HELLO https://t.co/vjk4fSckKr

RT @KamalaHarris: Today marks three weeks until Election Day.
Let’s roll up our sleeves and make every moment count.
It’s going to take…
RT @marceelias: 🚨BREAKING: Georgia Court DECLARES "no election superintendent (or member of a board of elections and registration) may refu…

RT @mmpadellan: TWEEPS: I remember January 6th vividly. It was a shocking, disgraceful day.
He cannot be our President again.
Can we get…
RT @Domo8186: I can't relate to 34 felonies or inciting a riot at the Capitol and not going to jail lol
RT @DerekCressman: “it quickly became clear that the former president has no conception of the mechanics of or the potential ramifications…

RT @KamalaHarris: Ask Donald Trump what his plan is for Black America.
I'll tell you what it is: Look at Project 2025. https://t.co/rBfENJ…

RT @UAW: Donald Trump just insulted every American autoworker, saying that "a child could do it."

RT @AmoneyResists: This. Was. Not. A. Peaceful. Transfer. Of. Power. https://t.co/5cMUyv2lq1

RT @ColinAllredTX: On January 6, I got ready to defend my colleagues and texted my wife: “Whatever happens, I love you.”
Ted Cruz was hidi…
RT @Acyn: Allred: If you don’t like how things are going in Washington, he’s responsible for it. He’s introduced this type of angertainment…

RT @marceelias: MAGA election deniers in Georgia had a really bad day today in court.
